subcodes.first_line: Thou hadst inquired concerning the matter of creation. The mystics thus believe that the realities of all things have become manifest from the True One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در مسئله خلقت استفسار نموده بوديد . متصوّفين چنان اعتقاد نمايند که حقائق اشيا از حقّ ظهور يافته
subcodes.subjects: @emanation vs. manifestation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
